creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
farrokhi    2006-11-08 19:15:14 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    net/tcpxd            Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  tcpxd is a general purpose TCP/IP relay program designed
  to be simple to get going, requiring only three parameters;
  the port to listen on, the host to forward to, and the port
  on that host to connect to.
  
  PR:             ports/104902
  Submitted by:   self
  Approved by:    miwi (mentor)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1757    +1 -0      ports/net/Makefile
  1.1       +25 -0     ports/net/tcpxd/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/net/tcpxd/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/net/tcpxd/pkg-descr (new)
